title: pyrus communis var. longicaudis
side_effects: Pyrus communis var. longicaudis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal upset, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling. Additionally, using Pyrus communis var. longicaudis for an extended period may result in liver damage and decreased kidney function. It is crucial to consult with a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these potential side effects.
